items.quote: EduExpert made my dream of studying in Germany a reality. Their guidance through the visa process was exceptional and stress-free.
items.name: Priya Sharma

items.quote: The team's expertise in Canadian immigration helped me secure my study permit in record time. Highly recommended for anyone planning to study abroad!
items.name: Rahul Verma

items.a: We offer end-to-end study-abroad and visa consulting — country selection, university shortlisting, application support, visa documentation, and pre-departure orientation.

items.q: What is the consultation process like?
items.a: Each consultation starts with a free profile review to understand your goals, academic background, and budget. From there we map a personalised plan.

items.q: How much do your services cost?
items.a: Service fees vary by destination country and the level of support you need. We share transparent pricing during the first consultation.

items.q: How do I get started with your services?
items.a: Book a free appointment via our contact form or call us directly. One of our advisors will respond within one business day.

items.q: What is your success rate with visa applications?
items.a: We maintain a high approval rate by ensuring every application is complete and well-documented before submission.

hero.title: Visa
hero.description: Every visa pathway, mapped clearly. Whether you're studying, working, settling, or visiting — we walk through the documentation, eligibility, and timelines with you.

whyUs.heading: Why choose EduExpert for your visa?

items.title: Supportive environment
items.body: Honest guidance from advisors who've helped families through every stage of the process.

items.title: Student-friendly policies
items.body: We surface the cheapest, fastest, and safest pathway for your specific profile.

items.title: Quality at every step
items.body: From SOPs to financial statements — every document is reviewed before submission.

items.title: Opportunities for growth
items.body: Beyond the visa: scholarship guidance, pre-departure orientation, and post-arrival support.

hero.title: Committed to Your Visa Success
hero.description: We deliver budget-friendly visa solutions, removing financial barriers from your journey. Our goal is to provide quality services at reasonable rates.

mission.heading: Guiding Your Path with Our Immigration Mission
mission.body: We're here to simplify immigration complexities, guiding you to success. Our mission is to unite families, open opportunities, and make your journey enriching. Your dreams are our focus on the path to a brighter future.

history.heading: Our Immigration Service history
history.body: Our history began with a vision to make the immigration process smoother and more accessible for individuals and families around the world. With a deep understanding of the challenges that accompany moving to a new country, we built a practice rooted in honest advice, careful documentation, and genuine care for every applicant.

values.title: Honesty first
values.body: If a country isn't right for your profile, we'll say so — even if it loses us the case.

values.title: Documentation rigour
values.body: Every form, every translation, every cover letter — reviewed twice before it leaves our desk.

values.title: Lifelong relationship
values.body: From first call through arrival and beyond. We're still around when your renewal comes due.

aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Advisors, counsellors, and case managers — the people who actually move your application forward.

hero.description: Tell us about your goal — study, work, settle, or visit — and we'll come back within one business day with a clear next step.

hero.title: Coaching for the tests that open the door
hero.description: IELTS, TOEFL, PTE, GRE, GMAT — the right score is often the difference between a shortlist and an offer. Our trainers focus on the skills that actually move scores.

tests.title: IELTS
tests.description: Academic & General Training. Speaking, Listening, Reading, Writing.

tests.title: TOEFL
tests.description: iBT format. Integrated speaking & writing practice with mock tests.

tests.title: PTE Academic
tests.description: Computer-based scoring. Pace and pronunciation drills tuned to PTE.

tests.title: GRE
tests.description: Quant, verbal, AWA. Timed sections with adaptive practice.

tests.title: GMAT
tests.description: Focus Edition. Quant, verbal, data insights — for MBA aspirants.

features.title: Certified trainers
features.body: Trainers with verified test scores in the band they coach.

features.title: Doubt-solving sessions
features.body: Daily one-on-one slots — never wait a week to clear a doubt.

features.title: Flexible batches
features.body: Weekday, weekend, online, and one-on-one tracks.

features.title: Free study materials
features.body: Section-wise workbooks and a graded mock test bank.
